channel.title: Greg Getner — Blog
channel.description: Field notes from 23 years of retention marketing: automations, deliverability, retention, and the expensive mistakes most operators keep making.

item.title: The Welcome Series Structure That Actually Converts
item.author: greg@getner.ai (Greg Getner)
item.description: Most welcome series are seven generic emails that sound like everyone else's. The ones that convert follow a specific land → check → qualify → offer structure—and never pitch in email one.

item.title: The Hidden ActiveCampaign Features Most Consultants Miss
item.author: greg@getner.ai (Greg Getner)
item.description: Six ActiveCampaign features I find turned off in almost every account I inherit — conditional content blocks, site tracking, sub-automations, predictive sending, non-sales deal pipelines, and rolling date-field segments.

item.title: Why Your Email List Is Dying (And How to Fix It)
item.author: greg@getner.ai (Greg Getner)
item.description: A retention marketer's diagnostic for when open rates slide, deliverability drifts, and replies go quiet — plus the four fixes that actually work.

item.title: 5 ActiveCampaign Automation Mistakes That Kill Conversions
item.author: greg@getner.ai (Greg Getner)
item.description: The five ActiveCampaign automation mistakes I find in nearly every audit — goal exits, tag sprawl, no-reply senders, dead contact blasts, and pacing problems — and the specific fixes that recover the conversions they quietly bleed.
